name: caplets
summary: [bettercap](https://github.com/bettercap/bettercap)'s interactive sessions can be scripted with `.cap` files, or `caplets`, the following are a few basic examples, look at this repo for more.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need Wireless, use caplets because [bettercap](https://github.com/bettercap/bettercap)'s interactive sessions can be scripted with `.cap` files, or `caplets`, the following are a few basic exampl.
When chaining Wireless tools, pair caplets with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caplets --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
